summary: Quiet inbox day with a key J1 onboarding milestone overnight (South Korea + Malaysia cohort). Stripe collected a $4,065 candidate payment. cti-usa.com flagged briefly by GoDaddy AI monitoring early morning and auto-resolved. Inbound funding interest from Inscription Capital. Tomorrow loads heavier with back-to-back Recruiting + Executive Team meetings.
